final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing logo for a tech lifestyle content creator, covering EVs, digital gadgets, and lifestyle products.

Style/medium: clean flat vector logo, minimalist geometric design, universal appeal for global social media
Subject: abstract symbol combining tech and lifestyle elements (circuit lines, leaf shape for EV/eco, or simple geometric mark), balanced with clean wordmark space
Composition: centered mark with generous padding, circular or square format for avatar use
Color palette: neutral base (deep navy or charcoal) with one accent (electric blue or soft green), works in monochrome
Text (verbatim): ""
Constraints: must scale clearly to 100x100px avatar size; monochrome version must work without color; no culturally sensitive symbols or colors; avoid religious, political, or region-specific imagery
Avoid: gradients unless essential; complex illustrations; region-specific symbols; religious iconography; political imagery; culturally sensitive colors; overly trendy design that dates quickly; Behance generic tech style
